_comment: Map 3-digit store IDs to human-readable display names. Used to populate the top-level `store_name` field on every AdaptiveCard. Stores not listed here fall back to 'Store {id} - {site}' using whatever the LLM put in the report's `site` field. Copy this file to store_registry.json (gitignored) and replace with your real fleet. Path is configurable via STORE_REGISTRY_PATH env var.
